title: dactylorhiza × approximata
intro: Dactylorhiza × approximata, also known as the hybrid orchid, is a unique plant species resulting from the cross-pollination of Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza incarnata. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × approximata are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Dactylorhiza × approximata is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies.
